name: vibe-builder
description: Builder workflows for shipping products with Vercel deployment, shadcn/ui patterns, Stripe integrations, and Supabase/Postgres best practices.

interface.shortDescription: Product-building workflows across deployment, UI, payments, and database design
interface.longDescription: Builder workflows for deploying projects to Vercel, composing UI with shadcn/ui guidance, designing or reviewing Stripe integrations, and applying Supabase/Postgres best practices for schema and query performance, all with plugin-local Vercel, Stripe, and Supabase MCP support.
defaultPrompt: Use Vibe Builder to deploy with Vercel, build UI with shadcn, design Stripe integrations, and apply Supabase/Postgres best practices while shipping a product.
